title: psydrax parviflorus subsp. rubrocostatus
intro: Psydrax parviflorus subsp. rubrocostatus, also known as the Rubrocostatus Psydrax, is a subspecies of the Psydrax parviflorus plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Psydrax parviflorus subsp. rubrocostatus are attributed to its rich content of phenolic compounds, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which have been found to possess antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential in treating various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The herbal preparations of Psydrax parviflorus subsp. rubrocostatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health ailments.
